case_title: FFPM CARMEL HOLDINGS I, LLC VS. STEFAN WATKINS et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FFPM CARMEL HOLDINGS I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WATKINS, STEFAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-04-2009

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FFPM CARMEL HOLDINGS I, LLC SERVED JAN-07-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WATKINS, STEFAN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WATKINS, STEFAN

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (IN ALL CASES EXCEPT FAMILY LAW CASES)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-27-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
